hook.summary: A friendly blue ghost character bursts onto the screen with flying coins and gems.
hook.visual_action: A blue ghost pops up in the center while gold coins and green gems float around it.

scene_flow: A large animated blue ghost appears with the title 'SPOOKY LINK GO GHOST'.
The screen transitions to a 3x3 grid of the same ghost character laughing.
Gold coins and green gems erupt from the center, filling the screen.
The sequence loops, maintaining high-energy audio and visual feedback.
on_screen_text: 18+. No real money or prizes can be won. Purchases / paid random items optional.
audience_proxy: Adults 25-55 who enjoy social casino games and vibrant, themed slot machines.
